data.title: Nokia Executes Strategic Share Buyback to Offset Dilution
data.description:
Nokia ( (GB:0HAF) ) just unveiled an update.

Nokia has executed a share buyback as part of a program to offset the dilution effects of shares issued to Infinera Corporation’s shareholders. This buyback, which is part of a broader initiative authorized by Nokia’s board, aims to acquire up to 150 million shares with a total expenditure of up to 900 million euros. The recent acquisition on March 12, 2025, amounted to 16,190,374 euros, increasing Nokia’s treasury shares to 163,883,963. This move is in line with regulatory compliance and reflects Nokia’s strategic efforts to manage its capital structure and shareholder value.

More about Nokia

Nokia is a leader in B2B technology and innovation, pioneering future-ready, intelligent network solutions. With expertise in fixed, mobile, and cloud networks, Nokia has been creating value through intellectual property and research led by Nokia Bell Labs for over a century. Their efficient network solutions, based on open architecture, integrate seamlessly into various ecosystems, enabling new opportunities for network commercialization and scaling. Service providers, enterprises, and partners worldwide rely on Nokia’s network performance, sustainability, and security standards.

YTD Price Performance: 13.55%

Average Trading Volume: 2,637,340

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: €25.52B

data.title: SentinelOne Reports Strong Q4 2025 Financial Results
data.description:
SentinelOne ( (S) ) has provided an announcement.

On March 12, 2025, SentinelOne announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2025, highlighting a 29% increase in revenue and a 27% rise in annualized recurring revenue. The company achieved its first quarter of positive non-GAAP operating margin, reflecting strong execution and platform adoption. SentinelOne aims to surpass $1 billion in ARR and revenue in the coming year, signaling significant growth and market positioning.

More about SentinelOne

SentinelOne operates in the cybersecurity industry, offering advanced machine learning security models and autonomous AI workflows. The company focuses on pioneering AI security platforms, positioning its Singularity platform as a leading solution for future security needs.

data.title: Cue Biopharma Appoints Pasha Sarraf to Board
data.description:
The latest update is out from Cue Biopharma ( (CUE) ).

On March 10, 2025, Cue Biopharma, a company in the biopharmaceutical industry, appointed Pasha Sarraf to its board of directors. This appointment follows the recommendation of the Corporate Governance and Nominating Committee. Mr. Sarraf’s appointment does not involve any arrangements or transactions that require disclosure under regulatory guidelines. He will receive compensation according to the company’s Director Compensation Policy, including an option to purchase 48,800 shares of the company’s common stock, which will vest over three years. Additionally, Mr. Sarraf entered into an indemnification agreement with the company, which may require Cue Biopharma to cover certain expenses related to his service as a director.

More about Cue Biopharma

data.title: BlockchainK2 Corp Updates on Management Cease Trade Order
data.description:
BlockchainK2 ( (TSE:BITK) ) has provided an announcement.

BlockchainK2 Corp has announced an update regarding the management cease trade order (MCTO) issued by the British Columbia Securities Commission due to a delay in filing its audited annual consolidated financial statements. The delay is attributed to the auditors requiring more time due to capacity constraints. The company expects to complete the filings by March 31, 2025, and the MCTO does not affect shareholders’ ability to trade their securities. BlockchainK2 is committed to providing bi-weekly updates until the required filings are completed and the MCTO is revoked.

More about BlockchainK2

BlockchainK2 Corp operates in the blockchain industry, focusing on developing and providing blockchain-based solutions and services. The company is listed on multiple exchanges, including TSXV, OTCQB, and FSE, indicating a broad market focus.

data.title: Genmab A/S Announces Board Constitution and Stock Grants
data.description:
Genmab ( (GMAB) ) just unveiled an update.

On March 12, 2025, Genmab A/S announced the constitution of its Board of Directors following its Annual General Meeting. Deirdre P. Connelly was appointed as Chair, and Pernille Erenbjerg as Deputy Chair. The company also granted 13,926 restricted stock units to board members and employees, and 4,214 warrants to employees, as part of its compensation program. These moves are expected to strengthen Genmab’s governance and incentivize its workforce, potentially enhancing its competitive positioning in the biotechnology industry.

More about Genmab

Genmab A/S is an international biotechnology company headquartered in Copenhagen, Denmark, with a focus on developing innovative and differentiated antibody therapeutics. Established in 1999, Genmab has a proprietary pipeline that includes bispecific T-cell engagers, antibody-drug conjugates, and next-generation immune checkpoint modulators. The company aims to transform the lives of people with cancer and other serious diseases through its advanced antibody medicines by 2030.

data.title: Goldgroup Upsizes Private Placement to Fund Strategic Initiatives
data.description:
Goldgroup Mining ( (TSE:GGA) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Goldgroup Mining Inc. announced an increase in its non-brokered private placement from 23,333,334 Units to 25,833,334 Units, aiming to raise approximately $7,750,000. The proceeds will be used for improvements at the Cerro Prieto mine, updating the Pinos Project’s economic assessment, reducing debt, and general working capital, subject to TSX Venture Exchange approval.

More about Goldgroup Mining

Goldgroup Mining Inc. is a Canadian-based mining company that owns and operates the Cerro Prieto heap-leach gold mine in Sonora, Mexico. The company is managed by a team with extensive expertise in mine development, corporate finance, and exploration in Mexico.

data.title: Real Brokerage Announces Leadership Transition with Sharran Srivatsaa Joining Board
data.description:
Real Brokerage ( (REAX) ) has shared an announcement.

On March 12, 2025, Real Brokerage Inc. announced a leadership transition with Sharran Srivatsaa moving from his role as President to join the Board of Directors, effective June 1, 2025. This transition is expected to enhance the company’s strategic direction, focusing on agent success and industry innovation, while maintaining its growth and innovation momentum.

More about Real Brokerage

Real Brokerage Inc. (NASDAQ: REAX) is a rapidly growing real estate experience company that integrates essential real estate, mortgage, and closing services with advanced technology to offer a seamless end-to-end consumer experience. The company operates across the U.S. and Canada, supporting over 26,000 agents through its digital brokerage platform and professional community.

data.title: WPP Announces Vesting of Executive Share Awards
data.description:
The latest update is out from WPP ( (GB:WPP) ).

WPP has announced the vesting of executive share awards for key personnel, including CEO Mark Read, COO Andrew Scott, and CFO Joanne Wilson, under the 2022 Executive Share Award and the WPP Stock Plan 2018. The transactions, which took place on 10 March 2025, involved the acquisition and partial sale of shares to cover statutory withholding liabilities, reflecting the company’s ongoing commitment to aligning executive incentives with performance metrics.

More about WPP

WPP is a creative transformation company that leverages the power of creativity to foster better futures for people, the planet, clients, and communities.

data.title: Centrica Executives Acquire Shares Under Incentive Plan
data.description:
Centrica ( (GB:CNA) ) has shared an announcement.

Centrica plc announced that its executive directors, Christopher O’Shea and Russell O’Brien, have acquired shares under the company’s Share Incentive Plan. The transactions involved the acquisition of Partnership and Matching Shares, with a total of 125 shares acquired at an average price of £1.464 per share. This move is part of Centrica’s ongoing efforts to align management interests with shareholder value, potentially impacting the company’s market perception and investor confidence.

More about Centrica

Centrica plc is a major player in the energy sector, primarily involved in the supply of electricity and gas to consumers and businesses. The company is listed on the London Stock Exchange and operates with a focus on providing energy solutions and services across the UK and Ireland.

data.title: CY4Gate Reports Strong Financial Growth and Strategic Advancements in 2024
data.description:
CY4Gate SpA ( (IT:CY4) ) has issued an update.

CY4Gate’s Board of Directors has approved the 2024 financial statements, highlighting a 15% increase in order intake and a 40% growth in backlog, signaling strong strategic execution and customer trust. The company anticipates 2025 revenues between €84-87 million, with significant contributions from recurring contracts and a robust commercial pipeline, despite challenges in the foreign forensic intelligence segment.

More about CY4Gate SpA

CY4Gate S.p.A., part of the ELT Group, is a prominent player in the cybersecurity and cyber intelligence industry, focusing on defense, corporate, and forensic segments in Italy and Europe.
